intro_sentences.en: Let's study the simple future of to go.
intro_sentences.pt-BR: Vamos estudar o futuro simples de ir.
intro_sentences.es-ES: Vamos a estudiar el futuro simple de ir.
intro_sentences.fr-FR: Étudions le futur simple de aller.

sample_sentences.en: The verb to go is useful for future plans.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: O verbo ir é útil para falar de planos futuros.
sample_sentences.es-ES: El verbo ir es útil para hablar de planes futuros.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Le verbe aller est utile pour parler de projets futurs.

sample_sentences.en: I will go to work early.
You will go by bus tomorrow.
He will go to the gym after work.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Ele irá para a academia depois do trabalho.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Él irá al gimnasio después del trabajo.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Il ira à la salle de sport après le travail.

sample_sentences.en: She will go to school in the morning.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Ela irá para a escola de manhã.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Ella irá a la escuela por la mañana.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Elle ira à l’école le matin.

sample_sentences.en: We will go together on Friday.
You all will go after lunch.
They will go to the beach next week.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Eles irão à praia na próxima semana.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Ellos irán a la playa la próxima semana.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Ils iront à la plage la semaine prochaine.
